Generic knowledge-stack PR template. If your repo ALREADY has a PR template, keep it
and just paste the "Knowledge (wiki)" block below into it — install.sh will not
overwrite an existing template.
-->

## Summary

<!-- what & why -->

## Knowledge (wiki)

- [ ] This PR changed **durable truth** (a decision, a non-obvious mechanism, a gotcha,
      or a public contract) → I captured/updated it in `docs/wiki/` in this PR (`/wiki`).
- [ ] `wiki-lint` + `wiki-verify` pass (pre-commit hook or CI).
- [ ] N/A — no durable truth changed.
